content: Someone in the general vicinity is setting off fireworks. The Chatty Bitches (what I call the neighborhood group chat on another non-meta platform) even pinpointed where they're coming from. It's good to know we can still celebrate May Day or whatever holiday today is. :BlobCat_Starstruck:

Mag nicht mehr. 😭🙈

content:
🟢 Military Operation | 5/10
🇳🇬

Nigerian Air Force intensifies strikes against Boko Haram
The Nigerian Air Force has significantly intensified air operations in the country's north-east. As part of Operation HADIN KAI, strikes are being conducted against Boko Haram militant positions. The primary targets include militant hideouts in the Sambisa Forest and the Tumbuns area. On 30 April, aircraft struck targets in the Alafa area. These strikes are part of a systematic campaign to eliminate the threat in the region.

#OSINT #NewsGroup #Nigeria #BokoHaram #MilitaryOperation

content:
🟢 Diplomatic Statement | 7/10
🇺🇸 🇮🇷

Trump: Iran offering bad deal, US may not make a deal
U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran is offering a bad deal and it might be better if the U.S. doesn't make a deal with them. He mentioned being busy with Iranians calling to make a good deal, but the U.S. won't let that happen. Trump emphasized that the negotiations are ongoing, but the terms proposed by Tehran are unfavorable. The American leader reiterated that Washington will not accept a deal that does not serve its interests. This signals a potential breakdown in diplomatic efforts if Iran does not improve its offer.

#OSINT #NewsGroup #Iran #US #Diplomacy #Trump

content:
I still remember this story my South Korean colleague told me - he is an alumni of one of the top 3 Korean universities. At an alumni event in Singapore, he went around introducing himself and his work, and when the question of “what sport do you play”, he said “badminton”.
(I knew him from the office badminton club. He was one of the most avid members.)

This was the wrong answer, his wife hissed at him afterwords, “GOLF. The answer is always GOLF.”

content:
I’ve always felt like I’ve needed “purpose”, a cause, a goal… external to my self, but no matter how hard I worked on whatever purpose I applied myself to, it wasn’t enough. And interspersed with productive periods were periods of procrastination, starting & stopping, going around in circles…

But since I started exploring the possibilities that I might be ADHD &/or autistic, & even more since my ADHD diagnosis (pretty certain I’m also autistic, but I’m fortunate enough to to need a formal label)… a purpose has been forming, which is much more satisfying, has no completion date or even a need to be completed. Instead of accomplishing something, or doing something, I’m simply being… me.

@actuallyautistic
#Neurodivergent
@autistics
@actuallyadhd

account.note:

Today I bought a Cisco ISR4431 for $60, which apparently is the going price?

I know they're about to go EOL, but this one's just for my collection of kitsch.

I also need to scrap the ISR4K library for my software catalog.

Shitpost machinegun.
